meaning: n.脚踏铁槌 Oliver 奥利弗(男子名)
examples: She cried when she spoke of Oliver.
They picked up Oliver and carried him shoulder high into the garage.
When not producing art of his own, Oliver was busy advancing the work of others.
The messaging system is not like traditional e-mail, according to fellow blogger Oliver Chiang.
But Mr Oliver has attacked the decision to allow academies not to comply with these guidelines.
